name: Puigcerda Bell Tower and lake walk
summary: A low-friction Cerdanya stop: the old Santa Maria bell tower plus the lake/park, useful around Stage 3 timing.
whyItMatters: Puigcerda is the selected Stage 3 viewing town, and this gives the day a local cultural stop without adding a drive.
ticketOrReservationNeed: Likely none for a basic exterior walk; verify bell-tower access if climbing.
pros: Already in the Stage 3 viewing town
Flexible, mostly outdoor, and easy to shorten
Adds local Cerdanya context to a race day
cons: Less destination-worthy than Girona or Barcelona museum stops
Bell tower interior access and hours need verification

logistics.opening_hours: Exterior walk is flexible; verify any official tower access hours locally.
logistics.reservation_needed: No for exterior-only; unknown for interior climb.
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Near the selected Stage 3 Puigcerda viewing geography; exact route-side distance depends on closure plan.
logistics.parking: Unknown on race day; use the parking-transit agent's later closure research.
logistics.road_closure_notes: Stage 3 passes through Puigcerda, so central access and parking are high-uncertainty.

timing.best_visit_window: Before settling into the viewing spot or after race passage if roads and crowds allow.
timing.race_day_risk: Medium-high for central parking/access, low for the walk itself once already in town.

nearbyFoodDrinkPairing: Pair with a central Puigcerda bakery/cafe or a lakeside pause if open.

sources.title: Ajuntament de Puigcerda
sources.note: Official municipal source to verify local visitor information, notices, and access.
